claims.text: Effective models of Cyber-Physical Systems are crucial for their design and operation
claims.source_quote: Effective models of Cyber-Physical Systems (CPS) are crucial for their design and operation.

claims.text: Constructing models of Cyber-Physical Systems is difficult and time-consuming
claims.source_quote: Constructing such models is difficult and time-consuming due to the inherent complexity of CPS.

claims.text: Data-driven model generation using machine learning methods is gaining popularity
claims.source_quote: data-driven model generation using machine learning methods is gaining popularity

claims.text: Flowcean is a framework designed to automate model generation through data-driven learning
claims.source_quote: we present Flowcean, a novel framework designed to automate the generation of models through data-driven learning

claims.text: Flowcean focuses on modularity and usability in model generation
Flowcean provides various learning strategies, data processing methods, and evaluation metrics
claims.source_quote: By offering various learning strategies, data processing methods, and evaluation metrics, our framework provides a comprehensive solution

claims.text: Flowcean facilitates integration of diverse learning libraries and tools
claims.source_quote: Flowcean facilitates the integration of diverse learning libraries and tools within a modular and flexible architecture
